title.source: Customizing project descriptions with the Content Builder
title.target: Customizing project descriptions with the Content Builder

body:0001.source: This article is machine translated from english
body:0001.target: This article is machine translated from english

body:0003.source: The Content Builder is a powerful tool for customizing project descriptions. It provides a flexible way to build interactive pages by combining text, images, multimedia, and third-party embeds.
body:0003.target: The Content Builder is a powerful tool for customizing project descriptions. It provides a flexible way to build interactive pages by combining text, images, multimedia, and third-party embeds.

body:0004.source: With the Content Builder you can:
body:0004.target: With the Content Builder you can:

body:0005.source: Create rich layouts using sections and columns
body:0005.target: Create rich layouts using sections and columns

body:0006.source: Add multimedia elements such as videos, presentations, and documents
body:0006.target: Add multimedia elements such as videos, presentations, and documents

body:0007.source: Embed surveys and forms for audience interaction
body:0007.target: Embed surveys and forms for audience interaction

body:0008.source: Collaborate on documents or share updates directly in the project description
body:0008.target: Collaborate on documents or share updates directly in the project description

body:0009.source: These capabilities help make the engagement process more immersive and user-friendly.
body:0009.target: These capabilities help make the engagement process more immersive and user-friendly.

body:0011.source: Add text, images, and embed content
body:0011.target: Add text, images, and embed content

body:0012.source: Include surveys, slides, or news updates before or during engagement
body:0012.target: Include surveys, slides, or news updates before or during engagement

body:0013.source: Create buttons to link between projects or phases
body:0013.target: Create buttons to link between projects or phases

body:0014.source: You can use widgets such as columns to fill in your page creatively (e.g. adding content in the center only, adding an image on the right, ...)
body:0014.target: You can use widgets such as columns to fill in your page creatively (e.g. adding content in the center only, adding an image on the right, ...)

body:0015.source: How to enable the content builder?
body:0015.target: How to enable the content builder?

body:0016.source: Go to the back-end of your project.
body:0016.target: Go to the back-end of your project.

body:0017.source: Click the General tab to access your Project settings
body:0017.target: Click the General tab to access your Project settings

body:0019.source: Toggle Use content builder for description to ON
body:0019.target: Toggle Use content builder for description to ON

body:0021.source: How to use the different widgets?
body:0021.target: How to use the different widgets?

body:0023.source: Locate the left-hand menu with three categories: Sections, Layout, and Content
body:0023.target: Locate the left-hand menu with three categories: Sections, Layout, and Content

body:0024.source: Drag any item (e.g., section, layout block) to the canvas in the center of the screen
body:0024.target: Drag any item (e.g., section, layout block) to the canvas in the center of the screen

body:0025.source: Click a block to edit its text, image, or settings; the editor appears on the right side of the screen
body:0025.target: Click a block to edit its text, image, or settings; the editor appears on the right side of the screen

body:0026.source: Rearrange or delete blocks as needed
body:0026.target: Rearrange or delete blocks as needed

body:0028.source: Content Builder supports a wide range of embeddable content.
body:0028.target: Content Builder supports a wide range of embeddable content.

body:0029.source: Surveys: Typeform, SurveyMonkey, Qualtrics, and others. Copy the default sharing link and paste it into the embed field.
body:0029.target: Surveys: Typeform, SurveyMonkey, Qualtrics, and others. Copy the default sharing link and paste it into the embed field.

body:0030.source: Documents: Google Docs/Sheets/Slides, PDFs, and Microsoft Office files via OneDrive are supported. Extract the URL from the embed code if needed.
body:0030.target: Documents: Google Docs/Sheets/Slides, PDFs, and Microsoft Office files via OneDrive are supported. Extract the URL from the embed code if needed.

body:0031.source: Maps: Google Maps and ArcGIS links require cleaning up the embed code to keep only the https URL.
body:0031.target: Maps: Google Maps and ArcGIS links require cleaning up the embed code to keep only the https URL.

body:0032.source: Data Visualizations: Tableau and Google Data Studio embeds require you to extract and slightly modify the iframe URL.
body:0032.target: Data Visualizations: Tableau and Google Data Studio embeds require you to extract and slightly modify the iframe URL.

body:0033.source: Social Posts: Facebook and Eventbrite are supported; Twitter and Instagram are not.
body:0033.target: Social Posts: Facebook and Eventbrite are supported; Twitter and Instagram are not.

body:0034.source: Videos: YouTube, Vimeo, Dailymotion, Wistia, and Dreambroker (with special URL edit) are supported.
body:0034.target: Videos: YouTube, Vimeo, Dailymotion, Wistia, and Dreambroker (with special URL edit) are supported.

body:0035.source: How to embed third party tools?
body:0035.target: How to embed third party tools?

body:0036.source: Click the <Embed> option in the left menu
body:0036.target: Click the <Embed> option in the left menu

body:0037.source: Get the embed URL from your third-party provider
body:0037.target: Get the embed URL from your third-party provider

body:0038.source: Paste the URL into the embed field in Content Builder
body:0038.target: Paste the URL into the embed field in Content Builder

body:0039.source: ℹ️ Embedded links may appear differently on desktop and mobile devices. Use the height configuration option to ensure proper display across all devices.
body:0039.target: ℹ️ Embedded links may appear differently on desktop and mobile devices. Use the height configuration option to ensure proper display across all devices.

body:0040.source: ⚠️ Always test embeds by opening an incognito browser window to ensure the link works publicly.
body:0040.target: ⚠️ Always test embeds by opening an incognito browser window to ensure the link works publicly.

body:0042.source: Many embed links need to be trimmed before use.
body:0042.target: Many embed links need to be trimmed before use.

body:0046.source: Delete everything after the URL (e.g., width= or frameborder=).
body:0046.target: Delete everything after the URL (e.g., width= or frameborder=).

body:0050.source: You will get a link that looks like: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="<https://www.youtube.com/embed/abc12>" …>
body:0050.target: You will get a link that looks like: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="<https://www.youtube.com/embed/abc12>" …>

body:0053.source: Some functions of the Content Builder have restrictions:
body:0053.target: Some functions of the Content Builder have restrictions:

body:0054.source: Image resizing isn’t supported; images automatically fill their container.
body:0054.target: Image resizing isn’t supported; images automatically fill their container.

body:0055.source: Some social platforms (Twitter, Instagram) cannot be embedded due to external policies.
body:0055.target: Some social platforms (Twitter, Instagram) cannot be embedded due to external policies.

body:0056.source: Embed links often require manual editing to remove iframe code.
body:0056.target: Embed links often require manual editing to remove iframe code.

body:0058.source: Select the File Attachment widget to upload a file to the project
body:0058.target: Select the File Attachment widget to upload a file to the project

body:0059.source: ⚠️ 360 input will open in a new window, make sure to save your project beforehand
body:0059.target: ⚠️ 360 input will open in a new window, make sure to save your project beforehand

body:0060.source: Return to the project, in the file attachment widget, select the file you would like to embed
body:0060.target: Return to the project, in the file attachment widget, select the file you would like to embed

body:0062.source: Right click the attached file in the content builder, select Open Link in New Tab
body:0062.target: Right click the attached file in the content builder, select Open Link in New Tab

body:0063.source: Copy the URL in the new tab
body:0063.target: Copy the URL in the new tab

body:0064.source: Select the Embed widget, in the website address past the URL from the file attachment tab
body:0064.target: Select the Embed widget, in the website address past the URL from the file attachment tab

body:0065.source: If you do not want the attached file to be visible in the project description:
body:0065.target: If you do not want the attached file to be visible in the project description:

body:0066.source: Create a new project and hide it by setting the Access Rights to Unlisted
body:0066.target: Create a new project and hide it by setting the Access Rights to Unlisted

body:0067.source: Attach the PDFs you want to embed in other projects in this project
body:0067.target: Attach the PDFs you want to embed in other projects in this project

body:0068.source: Follow the same instructions above for embedding the PDFs
body:0068.target: Follow the same instructions above for embedding the PDFs
